messages.content: Lauren needs checked-off items filtered out from the printable task list view — only pending items should appear when printed. Currently completed tasks are showing on the printed sheets, cluttering the view. Can you adjust the print template or filter logic so only unchecked/pending tasks render in the printable output?

I'll check the printable task list logic to filter out completed items.

[READ: render_schedule.py:1-100]

I need to find the printable task list functions to see where the filtering happens.

[READ: render_schedule.py:400-600]

Looking for the printable task list function to see where completed items should be filtered.

[READ: render_schedule.py:1200-1385]

Found the issue! The printable task list includes completed tasks but doesn't filter them out like you want.

[READ: render_schedule.py:1300-1385]

The printable task list includes completed tasks with checkmarks and crossed-out styling but doesn't filter them out - I can see the logic around lines 1308-1325 shows completed tasks with opacity and strikethrough. [WRITE: render_schedule.py:1245-1330] WHAT: Filter out completed tasks from printable schedule unless there are no incomplete tasks # Skip completed items in print view unless all items are done progress = load_progress() all_items_done = True pending_items = [] for item in day_list: if item.get("checkable") and item.get("task_id"): is_done = _item_done(item, progress) if not is_done: all_items_done = False pending_items.append(item) elif all_items_done: # Keep completed items only if everything is done pending_items.append(item) else: pending_items.append(item) # Always include non-task items # If we have any incomplete tasks, show only incomplete ones if not all_items_done: filtered_list = [item for item in pending_items if not (item.get("checkable") and _item_done(item, progress))] else: filtered_list = pending_items for item in filtered_list: t_raw = item.get("time_raw", "") t_disp = item.get("time_display", "") text = item.get("text", "") icon = item.get("icon", "") label = escape(text) if item.get("subitems"): rows_html += ( f'
' f'{escape(t_disp)}' f'{icon}' f'{label}' f'
' ) for sub in item.get("subitems", []): if sub.get("is_header"): rows_html += ( f'
' f'{escape(sub.get("text",""))}
' ) elif sub.get("checkable") and sub.get("task_id"): sub_done = _item_done(sub, progress) # Skip completed subitems in print unless showing all completed if sub_done and not all_items_done: continue carry_mark = "↩ " if sub.get("is_carryover") else "" rows_html += ( f'
' f'' f'{carry_mark}{escape(sub.get("text",""))}' f'
' ) else: rows_html += ( f'
' f'{escape(sub.get("text",""))}
' ) elif item.get("task_id") and item.get("checkable"): rows_html += ( f'
' f'{escape(t_disp)}' f'{icon}' f'{label}' f'' f'
' ) else: rows_html += ( f'
' f'{escape(t_disp)}' f'{icon}' f'{label}' f'
' ) [/WRITE]
Show more tasks on the task list of my page
